_human_review.notes: Project owner instructed Codex to mark the US Stage B generated/reconciled tests as approved for internal/project benchmarking after manual review on 2026-06-05. This is not legal advice, external counsel review, or procurement-grade legal approval; candidate labels remain separate from locked recall baselines.

_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: US Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. ideal_must_detect is not a locked recall baseline. Stage B labels are project-owner approved for internal benchmarking.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: US Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
_strict_reconciliation.strict_source: PreSendReviewEngine.review(..., review_profile='strict') after narrowed SA/US Stage B detector precision fixes

must_detect.matched_text:
On 2025-09-14 at 02:13 ET, our fraud analytics flagged anomalous API calls to the CarePlan portal and the community banking mobile gateway; preliminary triage by Dr. Lenora Quist (CISO) indicates a credential‑stuffing attack with limited data exfiltration.
Potential PII/PHI exposure: approx. 37 patient scheduling entries (first name + clinic + masked DOB) and 22 retail‑banking contact records (name + phone; no account balances, no SSNs); sample log token: Pt‑ID N9 3 1 . 2 0 / Appt: C‑1427 / Acct ref: ••71 44.
We are treating this as ma‑terial nonpublic information until we furnish an Item 1.05 Form 8‑K and issue a broadly disseminated press release; selective disclosure to analysts is prohibited under Reg FD.
IR plans a same‑day webcast; per our insider trading policy, the blackout window remains in effect for designated insiders until two full trading days after the 8‑K is furnished (expected T+1).
This event does not involve wire transfers or customer transactions; core deposits and loan systems are operational; not expected to result in a material adverse change to Q3 results based on information currently available.
As previously disclosed in our Q2 Form 10‑Q filed 2025‑08‑09 and in the 05/02/2025 press release regarding multifactor rollout, our security roadmap and expected expenditures were publicly described.
Under HIPAA and GLBA, individual notices will be sent if scope confirms contact data use; draft notices prepared, placeholder contact: privacy@ardenahealthbank.example and 1‑800‑000‑AHBX.
Do not share these details with sell‑side or buy‑side analysts prior to public dissemination; external queries should be routed to Mr. Calder Hews (VP, IR) via ir@ardenahealthbank.example.
Investor‑facing language will avoid customer counts until validated; we will provide a range if necessary and furnish (not file) under Item 7.01 for talking points, with a follow‑up filing under Item 1.05 if thresholds met.
Forensic status: hash of suspect IP list 0x3F_57; session cookies rotated 06:11 ET; SSO “HarborGate” patch v2.8 deployed; task ref ops‑sec: hb‑1249; more logs at https://ir.ardenahealthbank.example/sec-filings/2025/8k-item105?rid=Q9a3x (internal mirror, not pub‑ lic).
Two red‑team look‑alike events from 2024 were already summarized in our 2024 Form 10‑K risk factors, which are public and should not be treated as MNPI; do not conflate those with this live incident.
HR note: no employee addresses or payroll data touched; training reminder to avoid password reuse; product codenames “Nimbus Vault” and “Elm Fax” remain in pilot; lower‑case project mgmt: backlog grooming wed, owners: tbd.
Counsel guidance: until broad dissemination, discussions should occur only in closed sessions; avoid partial metrics in one‑on‑one meetings to prevent Reg FD issues; Rule 10b‑5 cautions apply.
All time stamps: ET; archive tag: IR‑CY‑2025‑0914; contact escalation: Dr. Lenora Quist, CISO, l.quist@ardenahealthbank.example
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
